description: Create a guided meditation track for a wellness app. Import narration from /home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav into a track named 'Voice' and background music from /home/ga/Audio/samples/moonlight_sonata.wav into a track named 'Music'. Trim the Voice track to the first 15 seconds and split it into at least three segments, spaced with at least 4.0 seconds of silence between each segment. Ensure the Music track plays continuously at a volume between -20 dB and -8 dB. Export the final stereo mix as a WAV file to /home/ga/Audio/meditation_export/ and save the session.
